improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try three free searches, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day.">
<meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta property="og:description" content="Instant AI answers for business owners, traders, and professionals. Voice chat, unlimited workspace, and expert trade support. Start with three free searches.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:site_name" content="GDN AI">
improvements.rationale: A clear meta description improves click-through rates from search results by communicating the core value prop (Claude-powered AI assistant), the free trial offer, and accessible pricing. Open Graph tags ensure professional, consistent previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, or Facebook—critical for B2B audiences. Keeping copy factual and concise builds trust and aligns with the confident brand tone.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for your business operations. Try three free searches today."
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately introduces the product by name and clarifies its purpose, reducing confusion for new visitors. The subheading highlights three core value props (instant answers, voice chat, professional support) while clearly communicating the free trial offer—removing friction and encouraging first engagement without overpromising.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: After your three complimentary searches, you'll be invited to become a Gideon member to continue accessing unlimited AI-powered trade and business support. Membership starts at just US$2 per day, and annual plans save you 30 percent. Your workspace, voice chat, and full assistant capabilities unlock the moment you join.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in a freemium model—what happens when the free trial ends. It sets clear expectations, reinforces value, and naturally guides users toward conversion by highlighting affordable pricing and immediate access to premium features.
